plugins.name: autopilot
plugins.description: Autonomous SWE agent loop — turns a feature description into a reviewed PR. Interviews once, then runs autonomously: explores codebase, spawns parallel build teams, verifies quality, gets fresh-eyes code review, and iterates until work passes.

plugins.name: cmux
plugins.description: Terminal multiplexer control — manipulate panes, splits, workspaces, tabs, surfaces, browser panels, notifications, and sidebar status inside cmux.

plugins.name: sync-claude
plugins.description: Sync Claude Code settings between machines via dotfiles git repo. Copies files (no symlinks) between ~/.claude and ~/dotfiles/.claude.

plugins.name: todos
plugins.description: Persistent file-based todo management with groups, priorities, duplicate detection, auto-archive, and autonomous worktree-based implementation.

plugins.name: stacked-prs
plugins.description: Manage stacked PR workflows — create, rebase, push, and track multi-PR feature development with auto-detected branch structure.

plugins.name: pr-patrol
plugins.description: Automated PR lifecycle management — babysit open PRs (rebase, fix CI, address reviews) and sweep merged PRs for missed review feedback.
